headline: EMCOR's Electrical Segment Surges in Q4: Structural Upside?
summary: EME's Electrical segment posts record $1.36B Q4 revenues, up 45.8%, with $4.46B in RPOs signaling durable, higher-margin growth ahead.

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation After Q4 Beat And Higher 2026 Revenue Outlook
summary: Quanta Services (PWR) is back in focus after fourth quarter 2025 results topped expectations, with its Electric division and recent acquisitions playing key roles and management lifting the 2026 revenue outlook. See our latest analysis for Quanta Services. At a share price of US$566.0, Quanta Services has had a 30 day share price return of 19.25% and a year to date share price return of 28.73%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 127% and 5 year total shareholder return of about 6x...
